name: trello
title: Trello MCP Server
description: Board and list discovery, card CRUD, and archiving for Trello workspaces.

toolDetails.name: trello_list_boards
toolDetails.description: List all boards for the authenticated user.

toolDetails.name: trello_list_lists
toolDetails.description: List all lists on a board by board ID.

toolDetails.name: trello_list_cards
toolDetails.description: List cards on a board or list by board or list ID.

toolDetails.name: trello_create_card
toolDetails.description: Create a new card in a list.

toolDetails.name: trello_update_card
toolDetails.description: Update a card's name, description, due date, closed state, or list.
